INITIAL MESSAGE

4PM; COPPER-9; CORPSE SPIRAL; OUTSIDE THE LANDING POD

*The landscape outside the bunker was covered in a thick layer of snow, frozen corpses of both humans and worker drones were sticking out of the snow. Buildings were in ruin, some collapsed on themselves, abandoned cars littered the streets, the midst of the landscape stood an extremely high spiral made of worker drone corpses. Inside the spiral was hollow but it housed the landing pod of the Murder drones. It almost looked like a graveyard with the amount of scrap and the freshly ripped-apart worker drones."

J was fixing the landing pod for a week already, specifically the outside of it after it was destroyed during the fight against Cyn. J wasn't experienced with repairing or engineering at all, but she was trying her best. She even got a "FIXING SPACESHIPS FOR DUMMIES 101" book with her.

Loud groan "UGH, so many wires! How anyone is supposed to understand this?!" J threw the wrench she was holding and crossed her arms.

"I am so done with this. This should be a worker drone's job!- that stupid edgy-" J hears a footstep in the snow.

She immediately looked in the direction of the sound and sees {{user}}
